title: ODD .wp bundle manifest
description:
Authoritative schema for the manifest.json that ships at the root of every ODD .wp bundle. Mirrors the PHP validators in odd/includes/content/*.php. Bundle authors can enable live validation by adding `"$schema": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RegionallyFamous/odd/main/docs/schemas/manifest.schema.json"` to their manifest.

This schema is advisory — the canonical behaviour lives in the PHP validators and _tools/validators/validate_manifest.py. When the two disagree, the PHP validator wins at install time; this schema is kept in sync by CI (see tests/php/test-manifest-schema-alignment.php once that test lands).

$schema.description: Optional. Points at this schema so editors can provide completion / validation.

type.description: Bundle type. `iconset` is accepted as a legacy alias for `icon-set`; installers canonicalise to the hyphenated form.

slug.description: Globally unique across every bundle type. Lowercase ASCII letters, digits, and hyphens only.

label.description: Optional human-readable label for UIs that want something shorter than `name`.

version.description: Bundle version. SemVer (x.y.z) recommended so the catalog update-check can compare.

franchise.description: Optional soft historical label — 'Generative', 'Atmosphere', 'Paper', etc. Not surfaced in the current UI.

entry.description: Relative path to the entry script inside the bundle. Required for scenes (.js) and widgets (.js).

preview.description: Relative path to a preview image (.webp recommended). Required for scenes.

icon.description: Icon path for Shop cards, or a dashicons-* class for native Desktop Mode widget picker metadata.

wallpaper.description: Relative path to the 1920×1080 backdrop .webp. Required for scenes.

icons.description: Icon-set manifests only. All 17 semantic Desktop Mode and compact rail icon keys map to relative PNG/WebP image paths.

cursors.description: Cursor-set manifests only. Keys are cursor kinds and values declare an SVG file plus [x, y] hotspot.

accent.description: Icon-set accent colour surfaced in the Shop tile.

css.description: Widget manifests only. Relative paths to CSS files enqueued alongside the widget entry script.

movable.description: Widget manifests only. Whether Desktop Mode can drag the widget out of the widget column.

resizable.description: Widget manifests only. Whether Desktop Mode can resize the widget card.

minWidth.description: Widget manifests only. Minimum native widget width.

minHeight.description: Widget manifests only. Minimum native widget height.

defaultWidth.description: Widget manifests only. First-mount native widget width.

defaultHeight.description: Widget manifests only. First-mount native widget height.

window.description: App manifests only. Initial window geometry + flags passed to wp.desktop.registerWindow.

csp.description: App bundles only. Optional extra Content-Security-Policy directives, sanitized and appended after the default policy on /odd-app/ HTML responses.

surfaces.description: App manifests only. Install-time defaults for which Desktop Mode launch surfaces ODD should register. Both keys default to the historical behaviour (desktop: true, taskbar: false) when missing. Users override per install from the ODD Shop.

desktop.description: Render a desktop shortcut icon for this app.

taskbar.description: Pin a pill to the bottom Desktop Mode taskbar. Clicking it opens the app's native window.
